================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D7 81 3E 7D 32
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x50
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 33

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x50
PayloadLen   : 33

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
10 7F EF 69 00 46 C3 23 00 00 00 3E 7B 14 AE 3D 
3D 0A 57 3D 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
01 

[RETURN VALUE]
10 7F EF 69 00 46 C3 23 00 00 00 3E 7B 14 AE 3D 
3D 0A 57 3D 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 
01
